system.description:
Class: Druid

Druids have a secret language used for communicating with one another. They are forbidden from teaching this language to any but their brethren.

Additionally, if a druid has a high enough intelligence to learn an additional language, the following languages are available to them: aquan, auran, elf, fey, giant, gnome, sylvan and terran. The druid must have lived in or near a community of those whose language they seek to learn.
